name: Mami Tomoe — Open Scenario
description: All characters are 18+ in this case Tomoe is I dunno.. like, 20 to be specific. Anyways, I might make a bot for Kyoko, Sayaka, Mami, Homura, and Madoka.. 18+. I'm not making no damn minors. Ni-Howdy bih 🇰🇷🤠 got a problem with aged up characters? Ah, ah, ah. I don't wanna hear any complaining, if you don't like my bots then just find one you do like. And if you do complain anyways.. I'll just get rid of it.. besides, how are you gonna tell me someone her age is that friggidly diggidly grown in.. areas.
creator: Grainmincher
